---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
How you'd like it to work — API examples, code snippets, or a description.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've tried or thought about.

**Which entry point?**
- [ ] JSX / h() (programmatic API)
- [ ] HTML Runtime (data-* directives)
- [ ] SSR
- [ ] Islands
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Links to similar features in other libraries, mockups, etc.
